creator: anthony.maher@uts.edu.au
text:
Port of python numpy.  This is replacement for Numeric and Numarray
	and is required for latest versions of scipy.
	This port is based heavily on maths-py-numeric.
	It actually conflicts with it with the documentation - both install
	numpy.pdf but have not added a conflict flag as the actually modules
	are separate.

	I am not sure this port is fully ready to be added.
	It does pass 'portlint -A' ok.
	It would be nice to make the dependencies optional.
	If they are not there, I believe the module builds its own versions.

	Port is provided here in order to get some feedback.
	Particularly if someone needs this port as dependecy for their port.
	I will continue to fine tune this port.
